de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class AbstractProfile

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractProfile
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Profile
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    JavaProfile

    public abstract class AbstractProfile
extends Object
implements Profile

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static Profile defaultProfile
      The default profile which is used if no profile is defined in custom problem files (loaded via KeYUserProblemFile).
      private GoalChooserBuilder prototype 
      private RuleCollection standardRules 
      private ImmutableSet<StrategyFactory> strategies 
      private ImmutableSet<String> supportedGC 
      private ImmutableSet<GoalChooserBuilder> supportedGCB

      Returns the default profile which is used if no profile is defined in custom problem files (loaded via KeYUserProblemFile).

      returns the file name of the internal class directory relative to JavaRedux

      returns the file name of the internal class list

      any standard rule has is by default justified by an axiom rule justification

      • supportsStrategyFactory

        public boolean supportsStrategyFactory(Name strategy)
        Description copied from interface: Profile
        returns true if strategy strategyName may be used with this profile.
        Specified by:
        supportsStrategyFactory in interface Profile
        Returns:
        supportedStrategies()->exists(s | s.name.equals(strategyName))

      • getStrategyFactory

        public StrategyFactory getStrategyFactory(Name n)
        Description copied from interface: Profile
        returns the StrategyFactory for strategy strategyName
        Specified by:
        getStrategyFactory in interface Profile
        Parameters:
        n - the Name of the strategy
        Returns:
        the StrategyFactory to build the demanded strategy

      • setSelectedGoalChooserBuilder

        public void setSelectedGoalChooserBuilder(String name)
        sets the user selected goal chooser builder to be used as prototype
        Specified by:
        setSelectedGoalChooserBuilder in interface Profile
        Parameters:
        name - the String with the name of the goal chooser to be used
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if a goal chooser of the given name is not supported

      • lookupGC

        public GoalChooserBuilder lookupGC(String name)
        looks up the demanded goal chooser is supported and returns a new instance if possible otherwise null is returned
        Parameters:
        name - the String with the goal choosers name
        Returns:
        a new instance of the builder or null if the demanded chooser is not supported
